'''√p-p-ng''' ('''papanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dandle|dandle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dandle|dandle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| papanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:papangithi|papangithi]] || [[word:papangiji|papangiji]] || [[word:papangishi|papangishi]] || [[word:papangi|papangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:papanguthuth|papanguthuth]] || [[word:papangujuj|papangujuj]] || [[word:papangushush|papangushush]] || [[word:papang|papang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:papanguthu|papanguthu]] || [[word:papanguju|papanguju]] || [[word:papangushu|papangushu]] || [[word:papangu|papangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:papangufuth|papangufuth]] || [[word:papangufuj|papangufuj]] || [[word:papangufush|papangufush]] || [[word:papanguf|papanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:papangethe|papangethe]] || [[word:papangeje|papangeje]] || [[word:papangeshe|papangeshe]] || [[word:papange|papange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:papangothoth|papangothoth]] || [[word:papangojoj|papangojoj]] || [[word:papangoshosh|papangoshosh]] || [[word:papang|papang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:papangotho|papangotho]] || [[word:papangojo|papangojo]] || [[word:papangosho|papangosho]] || [[word:papango|papango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:papangofoth|papangofoth]] || [[word:papangofoj|papangofoj]] || [[word:papangofosh|papangofosh]] || [[word:papangof|papangof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:papangïfïf|papangïfïf]] || [[word:papangïfïf|papangïfïf]] || [[word:papangïfïf|papangïfïf]] || [[word:papangïfïf|papangïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]] || [[word:papangïf|papangïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:papangæthæ|papangæthæ]] || [[word:papangæjæ|papangæjæ]] || [[word:papangæshæ|papangæshæ]] || [[word:papangæ|papangæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:papangathath|papangathath]] || [[word:papangajaj|papangajaj]] || [[word:papangashash|papangashash]] || [[word:papang|papang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:papangatha|papangatha]] || [[word:papangaja|papangaja]] || [[word:papangasha|papangasha]] || [[word:papanga|papanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:papangafath|papangafath]] || [[word:papangafaj|papangafaj]] || [[word:papangafash|papangafash]] || [[word:papangaf|papangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:papangasha|papangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopapangasha|gopapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipapangasha|gokipapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:papangnüsha|papangnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopapangnknüsha|gopapangnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipapangnüsha|gokipapangnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:papangshësha|papangshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopapangnkshësha|gopapangnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipapangshësha|gokipapangshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:papangrosha|papangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopapangnkrosha|gopapangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipapangrosha|gokipapangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:papangmusha|papangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapangnkmusha|gopapangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipapangmusha|gokipapangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:papangsherasha|papangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopapangnksherasha|gopapangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipapangsherasha|gokipapangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:papangngasha|papangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopapangnkngasha|gopapangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipapangngasha|gokipapangngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:papangyasha|papangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopapangnkyasha|gopapangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipapangyasha|gokipapangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:papangyamasha|papangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopapangnkyamasha|gopapangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipapangyamasha|gokipapangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:papangnüshësha|papangnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopapangnknüshësha|gopapangnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipapangnüshësha|gokipapangnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:papangnürosha|papangnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopapangnknürosha|gopapangnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipapangnürosha|gokipapangnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:papangnümusha|papangnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapangnknümusha|gopapangnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipapangnümusha|gokipapangnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:papangshënüsha|papangshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopapangnkshënüsha|gopapangnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipapangshënüsha|gokipapangshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:papangshërosha|papangshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopapangnkshërosha|gopapangnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipapangshërosha|gokipapangshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:papangshëmusha|papangshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapangnkshëmusha|gopapangnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipapangshëmusha|gokipapangshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:papangronüsha|papangronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopapangnkronüsha|gopapangnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipapangronüsha|gokipapangronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:papangroshësha|papangroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopapangnkroshësha|gopapangnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipapangroshësha|gokipapangroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:papangromusha|papangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapangnkromusha|gopapangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipapangromusha|gokipapangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:papangmunüsha|papangmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopapangnkmunüsha|gopapangnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipapangmunüsha|gokipapangmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:papangmushësha|papangmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopapangnkmushësha|gopapangnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipapangmushësha|gokipapangmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:papangmurosha|papangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopapangnkmurosha|gopapangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipapangmurosha|gokipapangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:papang|papang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pæpæng|pæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopapang|hopapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopæpæng|hopæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopapang|hohopapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopæpæng|hohopæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüpapang|nüpapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüpæpæng|nüpæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüpapang|nünüpapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüpæpæng|nünüpæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïpapang|nïpapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïpæpæng|nïpæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïpapang|nïnïpapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïpæpæng|nïnïpæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupapang|lupapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupæpæng|lupæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupapang|lulupapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupæpæng|lulupæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipapang|lipapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipæpæng|lipæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipapang|lilipapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipæpæng|lilipæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopapang|kopapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopæpæng|kopæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopapang|kokopapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopæpæng|kokopæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepapang|kepapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepæpæng|kepæpæng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepapang|kekepapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepæpæng|kekepæpæng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
